name: waitdeadai-plugins
description: Open-source Claude Code plugins from waitdeadai: out-of-band hook judges that suppress LLM dark-pattern defaults, paper-grade claim ledgers, deterministic verdicts, no model in the verdict path. Self-hosted distribution while the community marketplace pipeline catches up.

plugins.name: llm-dark-patterns
plugins.description: 30-hook out-of-band suite that blocks LLM dark-pattern closeouts at Claude Code Stop / SubagentStop. Deterministic verdicts, no network calls, no model in the verdict path. Apache-2.0 with a public claim ledger and a companion academic benchmark (agent-closeout-bench).

plugins.name: searchoclock
plugins.description: Date-aware, inter-agent error-troubleshooting hook. On a Bash failure it injects a date-anchored deep-research protocol, dispatches a researcher subagent to recommend the most durable fix from live dated sources, and requires an independent second model (Haiku 4.5) to agree from the raw evidence before the fix is trusted. Opt-in proactive pre-flight; concurrency-safe for Opus 4.8 dynamic workflows. Apache-2.0.
